Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.SizeVerifier

Packages that use SizeVerifier
Package
Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension
Interfaces that may be extended but not implemented (because the methods contain a generic return type).
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SizeVerifier
    MultimapVerifier.size()
    Returns a verifier over Multimap.size().

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MultimapVerifier<K,V>
    MultimapVerifier.size(Consumer<SizeVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SizeVerifier
    SizeVerifier.isNegative()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always positive
    SizeVerifier
    SizeVerifier.isNotNegative()
    Deprecated.
    the actual value is always positive
    SizeVerifier
    ArrayVerifier.length()
    Returns a verifier over the array's length.
    SizeVerifier
    StringVerifier.length()
    Returns a verifier for the length of the actual value.
    SizeVerifier
    CollectionVerifier.size()
    Returns a verifier for the collection's size.
    SizeVerifier
    MapVerifier.size()
    Returns a verifier for Map.size().
